Title: The highlights of QA/RA Updates 11. May 2026 Quality Assurance & Regulatory Affairs Just One Click Away: Index Search with direct access the content, try out the Copilot Link now with each entry.
The FDAs Office of New Drugs (OND) has released version 4.1 of the OND Custom Medical Queries (OCMQs), which includes terms released in MedDRA v27.0 (https://www.meddra.org/) and earlier.
